role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on Hangul script and place-name etymology (e.g., 'Kim Dong-shin').
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed temperate deciduous species and urban landscaping.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road markings, guardrails, and signage standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized utility pole styles and building materials.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified South Korea using definitive linguistic and regulatory markers (Hangul, GS25). The agents adhered strictly to their domains, and the tournament logic was sound.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Hangul script and GS25 branding clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Temperate vegetation and road layout match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Deciduous trees and urban greenery match image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Utility poles and building styles match image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted South Korea.
